app.name: Xi Control
settings.title: XiControl Settings
settings.language.desc: Language of the menu, panel and pop-ups.
settings.autostart.desc: Via Task Scheduler, without a UAC prompt.
settings.brightness.desc: Separately for AC and battery; no Power profiles.
settings.battery.sub: Travel mode and the charge-ready sound.
settings.battery.note: The battery-care threshold (~80%) is fixed in firmware for this model — an arbitrary percent isn’t possible. The 80/100 toggle itself lives in the tray and panel as a quick action.
settings.travel.sound.desc: A jingle when the battery reaches 100%.
settings.charger.watts.desc: Wattage of the connected adapter when charging starts (PD adapters only).
settings.charger.weak.desc: If a connected adapter is below this wattage — an OSD warns about slow charging.
settings.battery.health.desc: Current maximum capacity relative to the design capacity.
settings.battery.cycles.desc: Full charge cycles the battery has been through.
settings.display.sub: Refresh rate depending on the power source.
settings.hz.auto.desc: Higher on AC, lower on battery — saves power.
settings.hz.ac.desc: If the exact rate is missing — the nearest is used.
settings.hz.note: The screen may briefly flicker or go black when the refresh rate changes — that’s normal, the display is switching modes. If the target rate is already set, nothing is switched.
settings.show.full.desc: Maximum mode. Off — removed from menu and panel.
settings.start.restore.desc: Remember the chosen mode and apply it at startup.
settings.start.pin.desc: Always apply the same mode at boot.
settings.start.profiles.desc: A separate performance mode on AC and battery.
settings.keys.sub: Actions of the Mi button and dead keys — assign any function to each.
settings.keys.mi.hold: Holding the Mi button always opens the quick panel.
settings.key.mi.click.desc: A short press of the Mi button.
settings.key.mi.double.desc: “Nothing” disables the gesture; single click fires instantly.
settings.key.settings.desc: The gear key. While the panel is open it always toggles charge.
settings.owl.feature.desc: Show the owl in the panel and menu (keep screen on / no sleep).
settings.touchpad.feature.desc: Panel cell and key action. A disabled touchpad always re-enables itself after a reboot.
settings.touchscreen.feature.desc: Panel cell and key action. A disabled touchscreen always re-enables itself after a reboot.
settings.log.desc: The %APPDATA%\XiControl\log.txt journal — useful for bug reports. Off — nothing is written at all.
settings.about.sub: Driver-free tray utility for Xiaomi / Redmi laptops.
settings.about.note: No kernel drivers, WinRing0 or direct EC access. Everything goes through the firmware’s WMI interface and Win32.
panel.title: Quick settings
monitor.title: Monitor
osd.hz.on.sub: {0} Hz on AC, {1} Hz on battery
toast.firstrun.title: XiControl is running in the tray
toast.firstrun.text: Click the tray icon for the quick panel, right-click for the menu. Holding the Mi button also opens the panel.
err.title: Error
err.noiface: MIFS interface not found. Requires administrator rights and a compatible Xiaomi/Redmi laptop.
